reason_code_map.strong_goal_pressure_profile: Recent combined scoring, xG and shot-on-target pressure is strong.
reason_code_map.high_combined_recent_scoring: Both teams have recently contributed enough goals to support a goal-floor market.
reason_code_map.defensive_vulnerability_present: Recent concessions suggest at least one side is vulnerable.
reason_code_map.market_supports_clear_favorite: Pre-match market probabilities indicate a clear favorite.
reason_code_map.draw_risk_from_market_is_moderate: Draw risk is not high enough to block the selection.
reason_code_map.avoid_defeat_profile: The chosen side has a stronger avoid-defeat profile than outright win profile.

user_facing_guardrail: Timing outputs are estimates based on historical profiles, not guarantees.
